div.p: Production-grade message broker with pub/sub fan-out and consumer group patterns
Package Structure: broker/ | protocol/ | log/ | offset/ | api/ Ports: TCP Broker :9090 | HTTP API :8081 | Metrics :8081/metrics

Length-Prefixed Framing: ┌────────────┬─────────────┐ │ 4 bytes │ N bytes │ │ Length(BE) │ Payload │ └────────────┴─────────────┘ Commands: 0x01 PUBLISH | 0x02 PUBLISH_ACK 0x03 SUBSCRIBE | 0x04 SUBSCRIBE_ACK 0x07 MESSAGE | 0x11 ACK | 0x12 NACK 0x20 THROTTLE | 0x08 HEARTBEAT
DurabilityPerWrite: fsync every write DurabilityBatched: fsync every N writes or M ms DurabilityOSManaged: let OS handle it Default: BatchSize=1000, BatchTimeout=100ms
Runs every 1 second Scans in-flight messages for visibility timeout expiration Default: 30 second visibility timeout Timed out messages -> re-queued
DLQ Operations: GET /api/v1/dlq/ GET /api/v1/dlq/{topic}/messages POST /api/v1/dlq/{topic}/replay Metrics: GET /metrics GET /api/v1/topics GET /api/v1/topics/{topic}/metrics
HEALTHY -> HTTP 200 DEGRADED -> HTTP 200 UNHEALTHY -> HTTP 503 Checks: log_writable, groups, dlq, lag
